channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Venezuela's top court issues a $10 million fine for TikTok over allegedly deadly video challenges
item.description: CARACAS, Venezuela (AP) — Venezuela’s Supreme Court on Monday issued a $10 million fine against TikTok for “not implementing measures” to prevent viral video challenges that have allegedly led to the deaths of three Venezuelan children recently.
item.dc:creator: JUAN PABLO ARRAEZ and MANUEL RUEDA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: China hacked Treasury Department earlier this month: Officials
item.description: The bad actor overrode security measures and remotely accessed workstations and "certain unclassified documents" from users.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Rhode Islanders' data was leaked from a cyberattack on state health benefits website
item.description: PROVIDENCE, R.I. (AP) — Cybercriminals who hacked Rhode Island’s system for health and benefits programs have released files to a site on the dark web, a scenario the state has been preparing for, Gov. Daniel McKee said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Atos database reportedly breached by hackers
item.description: Atos says it’s been warned of a potential ransomware attack, but there has been no concrete evidence so far.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: No subscription needed! Apple TV Plus will be free for everyone this weekend ahead of Severance season 2 premiere
item.description: You can stream any of Apple TV Plus' original shows, movies, and documentaries for free this weekend.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: The long-term impacts of AI on networking
item.description: AI is either going to spawn a golden age of profits and benefits or kill us all off, according to popular viewpoints on the subject. The latter view has been at least somewhat discredited; if you yell “AI” in a crowded theater these days, hardly anyone runs for the exits.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Windows Defender Security Center scam: How to protect your computer from fake pop-ups
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says a tech support scam used a fake Windows Defender pop-up, tricking the victim to call and download software.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2024: un año reseñable de avances para la salud digital en España
item.description: A lo largo de 2024 se han logrado avances muy significativos en Tecnologías de la Información y comunicaciones (TIC) para la salud en España.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The iPhone 17 is again rumored to be finally getting a high refresh rate display
item.description: With 120Hz and ProMotion, the standard iPhone will have smoother graphics and the option of an always-on display.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 5 reasons why I’m finally upgrading to Windows 11 in January
item.description: Been putting off that Windows 11 upgrade? Here’s why the time might finally be right to take the plunge.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Joby conducts first FAA testing under Type Inspection Authorization in simulator in Marina
item.description: Type Inspection Authorization testing is considered the final phase of the type certification process, which paves the way for an aircraft to begin commercial passenger operations, according to Joby.
item.dc:creator: James Herrera, The Mercury News

item.title: Millions of Android smartphones were quietly enlisted into one of the biggest crowdsourced navigation projects ever
item.description: Google researchers use Android smartphones to map ionospheric TEC, doubling coverage, improving positioning accuracy, and benefiting underserved global regions.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: Smart Home Cameras Pose Privacy Risks: What You Need to Know
item.description: Smart home cameras have become a necessity, but they also pose significant privacy risks. Find out what you need to know and how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Massachusetts Democrat suggests Trump’s TikTok support stems from his popularity on the app
item.description: Rep. Jake Auchincloss (D-Mass.) suggested that President-elect Trump's opposition to a TikTok ban comes from his popularity on the app and the video-sharing platform lobby’s influence on his inner circle. “With Donald Trump, it’s always some combination of two things, Jim.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Musk calls some MAGA supporters ‘contemptible fools’ as visa row intensifies
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk labeled a section of President-elect Trump supporters as “contemptible fools” as the online debate around visas for highly skilled workers on the right intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Trump asks Supreme Court to delay TikTok ban so he can weigh in after he takes office
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has asked the Supreme Court to pause the potential TikTok ban from going into effect until his administration can pursue a “political resolution” to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Scammers are targeting teens with these nasty tricks
item.description: Cybercriminals have more ways than ever to target teenagers; here are some of the most widespread scams and tricks to watch in order to keep your loved ones safe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they're using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: MAGA civil war erupts between Musk, critics over H-1B visas
item.description: A Trump World civil war has erupted over visas for highly skilled workers, with the president-elect’s new tech industry allies like Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy on one side and the anti-immigration MAGA base on the other.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, The Hill

item.title: Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge
item.description: Gain insights into the future of ICAM and its role in secure, modern government operations. The post Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: People who visit adult or gambling websites double their risk of malware
item.description: Visiting adult and gambling websites doubles the risk of inadvertently installing malware onto work devices, according to a new study. Fabio Massacci at the University of Trento and Vrije University in Amsterdam presented the findings of a massive analysis of real-life data from around the world.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: AI is helping students with disabilities. Schools worry about the risks
item.description: For Makenzie Gilkison, spelling is such a struggle that a word like rhinoceros might come out as “rineanswsaurs” or sarcastic as “srkastik.” The 14-year-old from suburban Indianapolis can sound out words, but her dyslexia makes the process so draining that she often struggles with comprehension.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Got new electronics for the holidays? Here's what to do first
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy walks through steps he recommends immediately taking after getting new electronics — like phones or TVs — as gifts this holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Five big events shaped Microsoft’s 2024
item.description: This was an important year for Microsoft: it added approximately a half-trillion dollars to its market valuation and cemented its lead as the world’s leading generative AI (genAI) company.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Japan Airlines was hit by a cyberattack, delaying flights during the year-end holiday season
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan Airlines said it was hit by a cyberattack Thursday, causing delays to more than 20 domestic flights but the carrier said it was able to stop the onslaught and restore its systems hours later. There was no impact on flight safety, it said.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Undersea power cable linking Finland and Estonia hit by outage, prompting investigation
item.description: FRANKFURT, Germany (AP) — A power cable linking Finland and Estonia under the Baltic Sea suffered an outage, prompting an investigation, Finnish Prime Minister Petteri Orpo said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: YouTube TV price hike got you down? 5 free alternatives
item.description: Was YouTube TV’s recent price increase the straw that broke the camel’s back for you? When does the cost of streaming TV stop going up? When?!! The answer is: Never. These streaming services are going to keep creeping upward in cost until we’re all shelling out $300 a month. Enough is enough.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: How iOS 18.2 now lets you share your AirTag's location with anyone
item.description: iOS 18.2 lets AirTag owners securely share item locations with trusted individuals. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson examines the powerful new feature.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: TikTok is full of bogus, potentially dangerous medical advice
item.description: TikTok is the new doctor’s office, quickly becoming a go-to platform for medical advice. Unfortunately, much of that advice is sketchy at best. A new report by the healthcare software firm Tebra found 45% of medical advice on TikTok to be false or misleading.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: 45 years ago, the Walkman changed how we listen to music
item.description: Back in 1979, Sony cofounder Masaru Ibuka was looking for a way to listen to classical music on long-haul flights. In response, his company’s engineers dreamed up the Walkman, ordering 30,000 units for an initial production run.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: The AI backlash couldn’t have come at a better time
item.description: At a developers conference I attended not too long ago, attendees did little to hide their disdain every time the term “AI” was bandied about.
item.dc:creator: Info World
